narrative:
Green 3-A (precinct in Summit County) has 971 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.5 percentage points.
